creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Jul 15 14:50:56 2013
New Revision: 323047
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323047

Log:
  - Update to 2.4
  
  PR:		180519
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/print/py-fonttools/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/print/py-fonttools/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/print/py-fonttools/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/print/py-fonttools/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/py-fonttools/Makefile	Mon Jul 15 14:50:22 2013	(r323046)
+++ head/print/py-fonttools/Makefile	Mon Jul 15 14:50:56 2013	(r323047)
@@ -1,22 +1,20 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-fonttools
-# Date created:				2 January 2001
-# Whom:                 		Joseph Koshy <jkoshy@FreeBSD.org>
-#
+# Created by: Joseph Koshy <jkoshy@FreeBSD.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	fonttools
-PORTVERSION=	2.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.4
 CATEGORIES=	print python
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An open source library for manipulating fonts, written in Python
+COMMENT=	Open source library for manipulating fonts, written in Python
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY} ${PYXML}
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY} ${PYXML}
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFODIR=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/FontTools
@@ -25,11 +23,13 @@ MAN1=		ttx.1
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-fonttools
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|share/man/man1|man/man1|g' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
 
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/Doc/ChangeLog ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/Doc/*.html ${DOCSDIR}

Modified: head/print/py-fonttools/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/py-fonttools/distinfo	Mon Jul 15 14:50:22 2013	(r323046)
+++ head/print/py-fonttools/distinfo	Mon Jul 15 14:50:56 2013	(r323047)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (fonttools-2.3.tar.gz) = b5c5afdbc19d21221d101df6e88d5c74dc83cde8b4834d790d8bb544ffcfa16a
-SIZE (fonttools-2.3.tar.gz) = 348810
+SHA256 (fonttools-2.4.tar.gz) = 95e5d8a67e2dae3ea237f9bebc449e0af42f12f03683db34f617e5b15d9d4fb0
+SIZE (fonttools-2.4.tar.gz) = 348885

Modified: head/print/py-fonttools/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/print/py-fonttools/pkg-descr	Mon Jul 15 14:50:22 2013	(r323046)
+++ head/print/py-fonttools/pkg-descr	Mon Jul 15 14:50:56 2013	(r323047)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ in Python. It supports reading and writi
 PostScript Type 1 fonts as well as AFM files and some MacOS-specific
 formats.
 
-WWW: 	http://sourceforge.net/projects/fonttools/
+WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/fonttools/
